channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?

item.title: Is it better to spend my savings now so I can delay taking Social Security? How do I choose?

item.title: Only 5% of U.S. adults can ace this 8-question financial-literacy test. Can you?
